# Transcript
AGAQH TYCH KLAYDIOY KAISAROS SEBASTOY GERMANIKOY NEIKHS
EPI QRASYLLOY ARCONTOS KAI IEREWS DROYSOY YPATOY KHRYKEYONTOS QEOGENOYS
STRATHGOYNTOS EPI TOYS OPLEITAS TO OGDOON KAI ARCIEREWS NERWNOS KLAYDIOY KAISAROS GERMANIKOY
KAI DIOS ELEYQERIOY EK TWNELLHNWN KAI ******TOY THS POLEWS DIA BIOY KAI IEREWS DHLIOY APOL
LWNOS KAI EPIMELHTOY THS IERAS DHLOY K**REWS TOY OIKOY TWN SEBASTWN KAI ARISTOY
TWN ELLHNWN KAI NOMOQETOYTIBER*LAYDIOY NOYIOY EX OIOY
KOSMHTEYWNEPIKTHTOS ) EYPYR**** TEIMHQEIS YPO TOY DHMOY EPI TW KALWS KAI
KOSMIWS AYTON TE BIOYN KAI PROESTASQAI THS ANASTROFHS TWN EFHBWN KOSMIOTHTOSEILHFWS
DE PARA TOY DHMOY KAI SEITHSIN EN ****EIW DIA BIOYTOYSDE PAREDWKEN EFHBOYS EIS TO MHTRWON
PAIDOTRIBOYNTOS ARISTWN** AFRODISIOY RAMNOYSIOY HGEMONEYONTOS ARTEMWNOS
TOY NIKIOY PALLHNEWS GR**TEYONTOS AREIONOS TOY PATROFILOY KHFISIEWS OPLOMACOYNTOS
SATYROY TOY KLEOME****FLYEWS PAIDEYTAI ERASTOS BHYS EYTYCIDHS MARAQWNIOS
EYFHMOS SYBALHT**OS GAIOS AZHNIEYS DHMHTRIOS SYBRIDHS ZWILOS FLYEYS
OIDE EGYMNASIARCHSAN
THTOY EYPYRIDHS PATROFILOS AREIONOS KHFISIEYS OYTOI KAI SYSTATAI
S ERCIEYS DHMOSQENHS SATYROY FLYEYS OLYMPOS SWTHRICOY A***YSIOS
TOY GARGHTTIOS SWKRATHS SWKRATOYS AFIDNAIOS TIBERIOS HR****WN EX OIOY
**MELITEYS ZWILOS QRASEOY AFIDNAIOS
PAGEITAI SYN TOIS GYMNASIARCIKOIS OIDE
*RISTWNYMOS ) OHQEN EPAGAQOS EYPOROY OHQEN
****DHMOKRATHS ERASTOY BHSAIEYS EISIDOTOS ) BERENEIKIDH*
***ISIOS )EYPYRIDHS ZHNWN DIONYSIOY POTAMIOS
THRIOS MHNODOTOY STEI**********WN KALLISTRATOY ERCIE*

***** AGAQOKLEOYS ESTIAIOQEN NIKOMACO*
***MAIOS MY*******
